description_long: This storage box is constructed from dark brown wooden planks, reinforced at each corner with large, matte black metal brackets. The box has a robust, cubic form, with the wood panels running vertically along the sides and a solid, flat top. One side features a distinctive diagonal wooden brace pattern, adding structural integrity and a visual accent. The other sides are plain, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The box appears hollow inside, suitable for storing or transporting items, and the open top suggests it is currently without a lid. The overall appearance is rugged and industrial, making it well-suited for urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or alleyways.
description: A sturdy, cubic wooden storage box with black metal corner reinforcements and an open top, featuring a diagonal brace on one side. Its rugged, utilitarian design is ideal for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows three vertical wooden planks framed by large black metal corner brackets, with a flat open top.
description_view_1: This side displays a diagonal wooden brace forming a 'Z' pattern, adding structural detail and visual interest.
description_view_2: Opposite side to the front, featuring three plain vertical wooden planks and black metal corner brackets, similar to the front but without the brace.
description_view_3: Side view reveals three slightly curved vertical wooden planks, again framed by black metal brackets, with no additional detailing.
